foundry-audio-receiver.settings.streamUr: World setting: HTTP MP3 URL for clients who use the global stream (e.g. SWYH via Caddy: http://host:5901/stream/swyh.mp3).
foundry-audio-receiver.settings.streamFo: Playback mode. SHOUTcast-style URLs use the same player for now; reserved for future differences.
foundry-audio-receiver.settings.followGm: Use this world's Global stream URL. Turn off to use your own URL in the playlist panel.
foundry-audio-receiver.settings.autoPlay: Play stream when the game loads
If a stream URL is set, start playback automatically after joining the world. Browsers may still require a click first for audio policy.
foundry-audio-receiver.settings.customSt: Only when "Use global stream URL" is off. Same kind of HTTP MP3 URL as the world field.
foundry-audio-receiver.settings.receiver: Volume for this stream only (saved per user). Independent of core Music / Ambient / Interface. HTTP format: max uses ×2 gain by default (HTTP_STREAM_GAIN_MULTIPLIER).
foundry-audio-receiver.panel.title: Audio receiver
foundry-audio-receiver.panel.expandSecti: Expand or collapse the audio receiver section
foundry-audio-receiver.panel.streamVolum: Volume for the external HTTP stream.
foundry-audio-receiver.notify.noUrl: No stream URL is set. A GM must set the world's Global stream URL, or turn off "Use global stream URL" and set your own.
foundry-audio-receiver.notify.playFailed: Could not play the stream. Check the URL and the console (F12). If you see a CORS error, the stream must allow your Foundry origin (Access-Control-Allow-Origin) or be served through a reverse proxy on the same scheme, host, and port as Foundry.
